Listings

Browse attractions in a clean, marketplace-style listing layout.

Cards are intentionally structured after GetYourGuide and TripAdvisor patterns: thumbnail, location context, rating, price cue, and a direct path into a full landing page.

Uganda • East Africa

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park

Mountain gorilla trekking in one of Africa’s most powerful forest landscapes.

★ 4.9 (842) From $700
Southwestern Uganda
View Details

Kenya • East Africa

Maasai Mara

Kenya’s classic safari icon for migration drama, predators, and broad savannah horizons.

★ 4.9 (1,384) From $95
Southwestern Kenya
View Details

Tanzania • East Africa

Serengeti National Park

Vast migration landscapes, apex predators, and one of Africa’s strongest safari names.

★ 4.9 (1,196) From $110
Northern Tanzania
View Details

South Africa • Southern Africa

Cape Town

A design-led city with ocean views, wine access, and easy day trips.

★ 4.8 (1,675) From $20
Western Cape
View Details

Zimbabwe • Southern Africa

Victoria Falls

The classic waterfall gateway for rainforest walks, river activities, and onward safari routing.

★ 4.7 (882) From $28

Marrakech & Atlas Gateway

A flexible route of medina culture, gardens, riads, and day trips into the Atlas foothills.

★ 4.7 (1,222) From $16

Murchison Falls National Park

Uganda’s flagship Nile-and-savannah park with boat safaris, game drives, and the dramatic falls.

Amboseli National Park

Zanzibar

A safari-and-coast favorite built around Stone Town, beaches, and slower Indian Ocean pacing.

Volcanoes National Park

Ouidah & Ganvié

Sal Island

Kruger National Park

Okavango Delta

Cairo & Giza

Trek Africa Guide

African travel guide and booking directory for regions, countries, attractions, stays, dining, and trusted partner booking paths.

Travelers can compare the route logic, nearby stays, dining, and practical access notes on Trek Africa Guide before continuing to external booking partners.

Affiliate notice: booking buttons redirect to external partner pages for the selected listing. Always verify live availability, rates, and final booking terms on the partner side.
